mainArea.welcomeDesc1: Describe your task and AI will plan and execute it.
mainArea.welcomeDesc2: Files produced along the way are auto-archived.
mainArea.starOnGithub: Enjoying ClawWork? Give us a star on GitHub

settings.setupCodePlaceholder: Paste setup code from gateway web UI or openclaw qr
settings.setupCodeInvalid: Paste a valid setup code so ClawWork can detect the gateway URL
settings.workspaceOldPathHint: Old workspace at {{path}} was kept — you can delete it manually.
settings.alreadyLatest: You are on the latest version
settings.trayIconDesc: Show status icon in the menu bar
settings.quickLaunchDesc: Global shortcut to start a new task from anywhere
settings.quickLaunchShortcutConflict: Shortcut may conflict with another app
settings.deviceIdDesc: Unique to this installation. Sessions are scoped by Device ID. To sync sessions across devices, copy this ID to the config file on the other device.
settings.confirmDeleteDesc: Remove "{{name}}"? Active connections to this gateway will be terminated.

setup.desc1: AI artifacts will be saved to the workspace directory,
setup.gatewayDesc: Configure the OpenClaw Gateway server to connect to.
setup.workspaceExplain: ClawWork saves all AI-generated files to a local folder and tracks changes automatically with Git.
setup.workspaceHint: You can pick any empty folder. A Git repo will be initialized automatically.
setup.gatewayExplain: ClawWork connects to an OpenClaw Gateway server. Token and password are the primary remote connection methods. Pairing Code is for first-time pairing flows when you do not have shared credentials.
setup.urlHint: ws:// for local, wss:// for remote with TLS. Format: ws[s]://hostname:port
setup.tokenHint: Use the shared gateway token. First-time remote connections may still require device approval.
setup.passwordHint: Use the shared gateway password. First-time remote connections may still require device approval.
setup.pairingCodeHint: Use only when you do not have a shared token or password. Pairing codes are single-use onboarding credentials.

connection.noGateway: No gateway configured. Connect to an OpenClaw server to start.

session.contextCompacted: Session compacted — older messages have been summarized

errors.agentNotResponding: Agent is not responding — it may be unavailable or misconfigured on the server. Try a different agent.

chatInput.poweredBy: AI can make mistakes. Check important info.
chatInput.offlineHint: Offline — browse past tasks and files

voiceInput.unsupportedTooltip: Voice input requires whisper-cpp. Run: brew install whisper-cpp
voiceInput.unsupported: whisper-cpp not found. Run: brew install whisper-cpp, then download a model to ~/models/whisper/
voiceInput.introDescription: Hold Space to dictate, then release to finish.
voiceInput.introStepHold: The transcript is inserted into the input box and is never sent automatically.
voiceInput.introStepInsert: Short press Space still inserts a normal space.
voiceInput.introStepBeta: Requires whisper-cpp installed locally. Run: brew install whisper-cpp

dialog.resetSessionDesc: This will clear the conversation context on the server. Local message history will be cleared. The task itself will remain.
dialog.deleteTaskDesc: This will permanently delete the task, all messages, and the server session. This cannot be undone.

slashDashboard.title: Slash Commands
slashDashboard.description: All available commands for the current session

pairing.title: Device Pairing Required
pairing.description: This is the first time connecting to this remote gateway. The gateway administrator needs to approve this device before it can connect.
pairing.instructions: Open the OpenClaw Web UI, go to Devices, and approve the pending request for this device. Then connect again with the same token or password.
pairing.cannotTestPairingCode: Pairing Code cannot be tested before saving. Paste a valid setup code and add the gateway directly.
pairing.stillPending: Not approved yet. Please check the Devices page in OpenClaw Web UI.
